results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Borno IPC Phase 5 + 35M Phase 3+ lean-season peak already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0 (reconfirmed Jun 24/25/26). Double-count screened (§3e-bis(4)). WFP imminent-cuts warning is a forward trigger, not a realized threshold.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Rubio framework (Jun 26) is an UNIMPLEMENTED, domestically contested agreement — Hezbollah rejected it Jun 27; war continues. Not realized positive own-conduct (no upgrade, §3e-bis(3)); war's civilian harm is Israel's conduct (attribution). No new Lebanese own-conduct either direction.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Fable/Mythos suspension (Day 15) is US Commerce action ON Anthropic (attributed to US, not Anthropic). Passed Jun 26 Congressional deadline is a forward trigger; Jumper hire not scorable as compassion conduct. Canonical 59.1; boundary watch 0.9pt below Established.

results.name: Apple
results.key_finding: Towson closure (Jun 20) + IAM ULP charge is a charge, not an NLRB-issued complaint or ruling (pre-adjudication); sub-threshold even if scored. Boundary watch active (0.6pt below Established).

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Expanded DOJ criminal/civil/antitrust probe is an investigation, not a conviction (pre-adjudication). Jun 23 DOJ takedown ($6.5B, 455 defendants) is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the alleged pattern.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: Baseline 17.5 set Jun 9 by the US's OWN conduct (not stale). DOJ Olmstead memo is policy-intent (forward trigger, pre-implementation); speedy-deportation resumption partly double-counts the already-scored deportation conduct; 66k ICE detention is incremental. Aggregate sub-threshold. Watch flags raised on EQU/ACC.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: UN COI genocide finding (Jun 23) and continuing Gaza/Lebanon civilian deaths are negative own-conduct. Lebanon framework does not mandate Israeli withdrawal (not positive own-conduct). No lower score exists.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: UN CERD Fulani extrajudicial-killing findings + 52.8M Sahel food insecurity continue the already-priced (Jun 1 reweighted) state-perpetration arc. Sahel calibration flag-for-review remains open at coordinator level (Mali 12.5 vs BF 6.3); no assessor one-off (§3e-bis(5)).

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: Ebola 1,155 cases/304 deaths (accelerating), first EU case (France, Jun 24), contact tracing 45% (own-conduct response failure). M23 mass-killing harm attributed to Rwanda. Compounding already-priced crises; no new threshold.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor reinforced: 784+ executions YTD (37-year high), 31 in 4 days, 134 in Khordad month, hunger strikes Week 126+ across 56 prisons. Continuation of already-priced own-conduct pattern; no new threshold.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: Houthi authorities forced WFP to terminate all 365 northern staff (70% of need); 73 UN staff detained, one died in custody; aid assets seized. Governing-actor own conduct. No lower score exists.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: El Obeid RSF drone siege Day 15+, HRW Jun 26 UNSC action brief unactioned, UNSC Jun 20 non-binding statement, famine in El-Fasher/Kadugli. No lower score exists.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced: 140,000 displaced in Akobo, 7.8M food insecure (56%), 700,000 children at risk of dying from severe wasting, four counties at famine risk, aid-worker attacks (state own conduct). No lower score exists.

results.name: Somalia
results.key_finding: Threshold-check: IPC end-of-June famine-threshold date passed for Buur Hakaba (IPC AMN Phase 5, GAM 37.1%) but NO formal IPC famine declaration issued as of Jun 27 (verified IPC/FSNAU + EU JRC). Compounding shock on already-priced crisis; no threshold crossing.

results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: 42-state AG subpoena + FL criminal investigation/lawsuit naming Altman are investigations, not convictions (pre-adjudication). Existing 27.5 already prices the pattern. Sub-threshold formula drift (canonical 27.2, diff 0.3) below flag threshold.

false_positives_screened.screened: Rubio framework (Jun 26) surfaced on a critical-severity alert. It is an UNIMPLEMENTED agreement that does not mandate Israeli withdrawal and was immediately rejected by Hezbollah (a governing-coalition actor) Jun 27; war continues. Signing a contested, unimplemented framework is not realized positive own-conduct — no upgrade. Negative within-window evidence must not yield a positive proposal.

War civilian harm (4,000+ killed, 1.2M displaced, 12 children killed/maimed daily) is predominantly Israel's conduct, scored against Israel, not Lebanon. No new Lebanese own-conduct downgrade evidence; absence of new own-harm is not positive evidence for an upgrade.

17.5 was set Jun 9 by the US's OWN conduct (band crossing) — a 'stale baseline' rationale is invalid. DOJ Olmstead memo is policy-intent, pre-implementation (forward trigger). Speedy-deportation resumption partly double-counts the already-scored deportation conduct; detention rise is incremental. Aggregate sub-threshold. Confirm + watch, not a proposal.

Fable/Mythos suspension is US Commerce action ON Anthropic (attributed to US, not Anthropic). Passed Jun 26 Congressional deadline is a forward trigger; Jumper hire not scorable as compassion conduct. Did not adopt drifted rotation cache; canonical 59.1.
42-state AG subpoena and FL criminal investigation/lawsuit are investigations, not convictions/settlements; existing 27.5 already prices the pattern. No multi-channel adjudication to move further.
DOJ criminal/civil/antitrust probe is an investigation, not a conviction; Jun 23 DOJ takedown is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the alleged pattern.
IAM ULP filing is a charge, not an NLRB-issued complaint or ruling; sub-threshold (<5pt) even if scored. Confirm + boundary watch instead of proposal.

Borno Phase 5 + 35M Phase 3+ already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0 (reconfirmed Jun 24/25/26). Re-scoring the same evidence would double-count. WFP imminent-cuts is a forward trigger, not a realized threshold.

Buur Hakaba verified at IPC AMN Phase 5 (GAM 37.1%) with NO formal IPC famine declaration as of Jun 27 (IPC/FSNAU + EU JRC Famine Review). Compounding shock on already-priced crisis; no new threshold crossing.

UN COI genocide finding (Jun 23) is major negative own-conduct but Israel is already at the 0.0 floor; no lower score exists. Lebanon framework does not mandate Israeli withdrawal — not positive own-conduct. Reinforcement, not a move.

M23 mass-killing harm attributed to Rwanda (scored against Rwanda). DRC's own-conduct Ebola-response failure (45% contact tracing) reinforces the near-floor but is a continuation of already-priced compounding crises; no new threshold.

math_hygiene.warnings_note: Pre-existing warnings in us-cities.json and us-states.json; none involve assessed entities.

noted_sub_threshold_drift.note: Below 0.5pt flag threshold; not a math-hygiene issue. Carried from prior cycles.

math_hygiene.rotation_cache_status: All 15 assessed-entity rotation caches already matched authoritative index values (refreshed in the 2026-06-26 cycle); reaffirmed this cycle. last_assessed bumped to 2026-06-27 for all 15.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN — coordinator-level Sahel-band ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT review pending (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Carried from 2026-06-24/25/26. Burkina Faso confirmed at 6.3 this cycle as the reweighted reference point; no assessor one-off action (§3e-bis(5)).
forward_triggers_logged: Lebanon: framework IMPLEMENTATION (LAF sovereign control, durable ceasefire, reconstruction) = positive own-conduct; continued internal armed conflict = negative own-conduct.
Somalia: a formal IPC famine declaration for Buur Hakaba/Baidoa would warrant immediate re-assessment.
Nigeria: actual WFP assistance cuts and a realized Phase 5 famine declaration in Borno.
United States: formal DOJ withdrawal of Olmstead enforcement or state re-institutionalization (EQU/ACC); realized harms from resumed fast-track removals (INT/ACC).
OpenAI / UnitedHealth / Apple: adverse ruling, settlement, NLRB-issued complaint, or admitted findings would be scorable.
Anthropic: EU AI Act enforcement (Aug 2); Congressional escalation on the Commerce export-control action (US-government conduct, not Anthropic).

entities_not_in_top15_noted.note: UN Working Group arbitrary-detention finding on Moussa Tiangari (HRW Jun 26). Sector-alert context only; Niger not in the top-15 priority list this cycle. Logged for a future rotation/priority pass.
Sarah Wynn-Williams gag-order lawsuit (Jun 25) — pre-adjudication. Sector-alert context only; Meta not in the top-15 priority list this cycle. Logged for a future pass.
